dollar_coefficient_calibration_sources.source: OperatorPricingPolicy.energy_price_per_kwh_usd (operator supplied; Aurelius already ingests real CAISO/PJM/ERCOT price data via aurelius.forecasting.price_model)
dollar_coefficient_calibration_sources.value_quality_when_missing: term reported uncalibrated; excluded from headline SLA-safe goodput/$
term reported uncalibrated; excluded from headline SLA-safe goodput/$

dollar_coefficient_calibration_sources.note: No CACHE_VALUE / CACHE_WEIGHT / MIGRATION_PENALTY scalars exist anywhere in this PR. Cache value is DERIVED at scoring time from predicted_reuse × prefill_throughput × operator_$/hr.
dollar_coefficient_calibration_sources.source: DOES NOT EXIST IN THIS MODULE

dollar_coefficient_calibration_sources.note: The shadow scorer's primary KPI is SLA-safe goodput/$ — a single quotient, not a weighted composite. No 0.4*latency + 0.3*cache + ... form anywhere.
dollar_coefficient_calibration_sources.source: DOES NOT EXIST IN THIS MODULE

scoring_inputs_existing_vs_upgraded.upgraded_source: Optimum-benchmark median p50_ttft_ms per (model_family, gpu) or CARA TTFT p50 shadow prior when the cell hits; max(production_value, refined) clamp is the safety floor
decode_throughput_tok_s × request.output_tokens or tpot_ms_p50 × output_tokens; both from Optimum cell.

scoring_inputs_existing_vs_upgraded.enters_at: score_residency_candidate -> expected_latency = queue_wait + model_penalty + adapter_penalty + service_s
scoring_inputs_existing_vs_upgraded.production_source: Sum of measured queue_wait + heuristic service_s
scoring_inputs_existing_vs_upgraded.upgraded_source: Same sum; ``service_s`` refined from Optimum/CARA priors, ``migration_cache_loss_penalty_s`` added when current_route differs and Optimum prefill_throughput_tok_s is available.

scoring_inputs_existing_vs_upgraded.production_source: Measured when available; proxy = queue_depth × service_s when not
scoring_inputs_existing_vs_upgraded.upgraded_source: Same; queue wait is Level-1 telemetry

scoring_inputs_existing_vs_upgraded.production_source: Telemetry adapter when available; None otherwise (veto)
scoring_inputs_existing_vs_upgraded.upgraded_source: Same
prompt_tokens / prefill_throughput_tok_s (from Optimum) × per_gpu_hour_price / 3600  → $; USD form requires operator_per_gpu_hour_price; otherwise reported uncalibrated.
output_tokens / decode_throughput_tok_s × per_gpu_hour_price; subset of service_time_s computation.
predicted_reuse_pct × prefill_time_s × per_gpu_hour_price → savings_usd; USD form requires operator_per_gpu_hour_price; otherwise reported uncalibrated.
SwissAI bucket-reuse forecaster output, fed into cache-hit value above. Currently classified diagnostic_only by docs/CACHE_PREFIX_REUSE_FORECASTER_V1.md.

scoring_inputs_existing_vs_upgraded.production_source: ModelLoadProfile.model_load_penalty_s — operator-supplied calibrated profile; missing → veto.
scoring_inputs_existing_vs_upgraded.upgraded_source: Same; the shadow scorer reuses the existing profile and never invents a cold-start coefficient.
When request.current_route differs and a recompute is needed: prompt_tokens / prefill_throughput_tok_s (from Optimum). Reported in SECONDS; USD form requires operator policy.
Same

scoring_inputs_existing_vs_upgraded.production_source: Encoded in location_key but never parsed by the scorer.
scoring_inputs_existing_vs_upgraded.upgraded_source: constraint_scorer_features.derive_gpu_type parses the trailing token of the location_key; used to look up Optimum / per-GPU operator price cells.
constraint_scorer_features.derive_model_size_b regex-parses size tokens (``-7b``, ``-70b``, ``8x7b``); used for fallback family lookup.
Same; carried through from production scorer

scoring_inputs_existing_vs_upgraded.production_source: Telemetry adapter; not used in score formula
scoring_inputs_existing_vs_upgraded.upgraded_source: Reported via AcmeTrace prior bundle; not yet folded into score
prefill_energy_total_kwh + decode_energy_total_kwh × (output_tokens / 64)  [Optimum]; fallback to AcmeTrace mean_w × service_s when Optimum cell is missing.
AcmeTrace IPMI per-GPU mean_w / p95_w (Tier-2 cluster telemetry treated as prior at integration layer)

scoring_inputs_existing_vs_upgraded.production_source: SafetyContext.gpu_hour_price (default 3.0); single global constant per scorer call. Operator-configurable.
scoring_inputs_existing_vs_upgraded.upgraded_source: OperatorPricingPolicy.gpu_hour_price_per_type per GPU type; falls back to ctx.gpu_hour_price when the policy is empty. No invented $/hr values are stored anywhere in this module.
energy_kwh_per_request × operator_policy.energy_price_per_kwh_usd. If energy_price is None the term is reported uncalibrated and excluded from the headline cost.
energy_kwh × carbon_intensity_g_per_kwh × operator_policy.carbon_price_per_kg_usd. Uncalibrated when carbon_price is None.

Latency MARGIN in seconds (sla_s - expected_latency_s); a quantitative indicator without a fitted sigmoid coefficient. Binary sla_met still drives goodput/$ to preserve the production safety contract.
Pilot timeout labels required; deferred to a future PR per FORECAST_LEVERAGE_AUDIT engine #12.

signal_hierarchy.level_1_measured: Pilot telemetry / hardware measurement / per-request observation / explicit operator policy. Source + units recorded; no fitted coefficient allowed.
signal_hierarchy.level_2_derived: Transparent formula on Level-1 and Level-3 inputs; no learned utility coefficient.
signal_hierarchy.level_3_prior: Bounded benchmark / public-trace / forecasted values; tagged ``value_quality = prior``; never silently treated as production truth.
signal_hierarchy.level_4_prohibited_or_uncalibrated: Invented utility coefficient / reward / penalty / weight; or a $-denominated term whose operator coefficient is missing. Excluded from headline.
